---
title: "prikazy"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-15"
---

```{r parkins}
old_parkins <- parkins
```

```{r parkins}
names(parkins) <- make.names(names(parkins))

```

```{r parkins}
str(parkins)
```

```{r parkins}
summary(parkins)
```

```{r parkins}
numeric_cols <- setdiff(names(parkins), "name")
parkins[numeric_cols] <- lapply(parkins[numeric_cols], function(x) {
  as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", x))
})

```

```{r parkins}
colSums(is.na(parkins))
```
